releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🎉 This is a stable release

**Version:** 1.0.0


## What's Changed
* Bump esbuild from 0.17.3 to 0.25.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/22
* chore(release): 更新发布工作流并添加赞助信息 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/24
* fix: BREAKING CHANGE by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/25
* chroe: 添加设置侧栏模态页面的静态预览测试 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/26
* chore(pre-release): bump version to 1.0.0-beta.1 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/27
* chore/upgrade-node-to-20 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/28
* fix: 修复设置存储与图标更新的异步和路径处理 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/29
* chore(release): 发布 1.0.0-beta.2 版本 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/30
* chore(deps): 升级若干依赖以修复漏洞和保持兼容 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/31
* feat: 重构 Obsidian Setting 的 react 组件 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/32
* feat: 抽离默认图标设置到独立分组 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/33
* feat(settings): 添加社区外掛启用开关及异步设置更新 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/34
* feat: 引入图标管理器与处理器架构 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/35
* fix(setting): 移除 Obsidian 设置项的 DOM 元素 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/36
* feat: 增加搜索筛选 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/37
* feat: 支持 lucide-react 图标并改进渲染逻辑 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/38
* chore(release): bump version to 1.0.0-beta.3 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/39
* refactor: 调整插件加载顺序和初始化逻辑 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/40
* feat: 避免重复渲染并缓存图标状态 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/41
* chore(release): 发布 1.0.0-beta.4 版本 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/42
* feat: 优化 Lucide 图标测试与去重提取 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/43
* chore: remove conventional-changelog related deps by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/44
* refactor: 将图标逻辑内联到处理器类 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/45
* Bump qs from 6.14.0 to 6.14.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/46
* feat(i18n): 初始化 typesafe-i18n 支持并修正脚本导入 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/47
* chore: 修改 FUNDING by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/48
* refactor(icon): 统一 SVG 图标的 class 名称 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/49
* feat: 增加随机图标功能 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/50
* docs: update README and CONTRIBUTING texts by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/51
* chore: 发布 v1.0.0 并调整依赖声明 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/52

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/pull/22

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/compare/0.6.3...1.0.0

releases.name: 1.0.0-beta.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
如果你在此版本遇到一些问题，可以先回退至[0.6.2](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/releases/tag/0.6.2)版本

- [feature] 设置的lucide图标可以自适应当前基础颜色 [#5](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/issues/5) [#13](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/issues/13)
- [fix] bug: "Faild to unload plugin custom-sidebar-icons"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [feature] 支持显示内部链接的文件图标 [#12](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/issues/12)
- [changed] 插件设置界面UI修改
- [updated] pin在侧边的文件如果锁定,锁定的图标会被隐藏

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [updated] 文件图标修改功能可同时为多个后缀设置相同图标 [#9](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/issues/9)
- [changed] 修改插件设置about页面

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [changed] 正式修改插件名称为"Custom Icons"
- [feature] 增加修改文件图标功能 [#7](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/issues/7)
- [changed] 修改插件设置界面

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [feature] 增加修改文件夹图标功能
- [changed] 修改数据结构,数据自动从customIcons迁移至SidebarIcons
- [changed] 修改插件设置界面

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - [fix] 设置界面补丁

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - [feature] 支持lucide源图标 [#2](https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-custom-icons/issues/2)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - [updated] 增加数据迁移功能,确保用户之前的数据能够使用

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [changed] customIcons增加type类型, CustomIconSettingTab增加Dropdown类型选择 #3 
- [fix] bug: 图标后面会叠加图片 #3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [changed] 依据官方要求优化代码
- [fix] bug: Windows无法使用绝对路径添加图标

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - [changed] 优化代码结构,样式修改至styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- [feature] 支持多种图像格式,包括在线URL,本地图像,base64编码和svg标签
- [changed] 数据结构发生变化,需要重新配置插件
- [fix] bug: 在删除多个图标时会导致错误删除对象
